shell.choose_certification: Choose a certification to unlock scoped areas.

dashboard.subtitle: Let's continue your exam preparation
dashboard.learning_desc: Study questions by domain with instant feedback
dashboard.no_sessions: No sessions yet. Start learning to see your progress here.
dashboard.mock_confirm:
Start a 150-minute Mock Exam with 60 questions?
You cannot pause once started.

exam.images_warning: Original exam screenshots (may contain answer clues):
exam.drag_drop_hint: Drag the appropriate blocks to the correct target areas.
exam.simulation_hint: Lab simulation task: complete the described steps in the Azure environment.
exam.placeholder_message: This source question is intentionally unavailable in the quiz app. Continue to the next question to preserve the original numbering.
exam.placeholder_continue: No answer is required here — use Next to continue.

confidence.hint: Rate your confidence — this controls spaced repetition scheduling:
confidence.saved_prefix: Saved — this question is now in box "

learning_guide.step1_desc: After you submit, you'll see if you were right or wrong, plus a full explanation with exam traps and key concepts.
learning_guide.step2_desc: Three buttons appear after each answer:
learning_guide.step2_guessed: Guessed — you weren't sure. The question comes back sooner for review.
learning_guide.step2_knew: Knew it — you were confident. Normal review schedule.
learning_guide.step2_easy: Too easy — no challenge at all. The question is pushed further out.
learning_guide.step3_desc: Every question lives in a box (1–5). Correct answers promote it; wrong answers reset it. Your confidence rating fine-tunes the timing:
learning_guide.step4_desc: Click the Flag button at the bottom to bookmark any question. Flagged questions appear in your Review Pool for targeted practice later.

review.title: Review Pool
review.subtitle: Bookmarked and incorrectly answered questions
review.subtitle_active: Bookmarked and incorrectly answered questions for your active certification
review.subtitle_all: Bookmarked and incorrectly answered questions across all certifications
review.scope_note_active: Only review items for the active certification are shown.
review.scope_note_all: Cross-cert review items are shown. Practice sessions stay certification-specific.
review.question: Question
review.empty: No items in your review pool — great job!
review.empty_hint: Questions you bookmark or answer incorrectly in mock exams will appear here.
review.empty_hint_active: Questions you bookmark or answer incorrectly for this certification will appear here.
review.empty_hint_all: Questions you bookmark or answer incorrectly across all certifications will appear here.
review.practice_scope_note: Switch to This Certification to start a review session.
review.practice_choose_cert: Choose an active certification to start a review session.

learning.title: Question Bank
learning.empty_hint: Try a different filter or search term.

stats.title: Performance Statistics
stats.subtitle: Track your progress across all domains
stats.subtitle_active: Track progress for your active certification
stats.subtitle_all: Track your progress across all certifications
stats.scope_note_active: Performance, weak spots, and exam history are filtered to this certification. Habit metrics remain global.
stats.scope_note_all: Cross-cert performance is combined here. Switch to This Certification to launch scoped practice actions.
stats.no_exams_detailed: No mock exams completed yet. Take a mock exam to see your results here.
stats.no_exams_detailed_active: No mock exams completed for this certification yet. Take one to see your results here.
stats.no_answers_yet: No answers yet. Start practicing to see your accuracy.
stats.no_answers_yet_active: No answers yet for this certification. Start practicing to see your accuracy.
stats.no_mastery_active: No mastery data for this certification yet.
stats.no_weak_spots: No weak spots detected. Great job!
stats.no_weak_spots_active: No weak spots detected for this certification. Great job!
stats.practice_scope_only_hint: Weak-spot practice launches from the active certification scope.

study_plan.title: 7-Day Study Plan
study_plan.subtitle: Structured exam preparation plan
study_plan.cheatsheet_desc: Exam traps, lab tracker, module tracker, quick reference links
study_plan.cheatsheet_subtitle: Quick reference tables, exam traps, lab tracker & official links
study_plan.coming_soon_hint: The certification shell is ready, but the guided plan and progress checklist are only bundled for certifications with published day-by-day material.
